list.title: Available Commands
list.usage: Use `/command_name args` to execute a command.

help.title: Help
help.fileReferencesHint: Use `@filename` to reference files in your workspace
help.fileReferencesExample: Example: `@README.md explain this project` will include the file content
help.exampleFileRef: `@README.md explain this project` - Reference file and ask question
